CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , "Mr."), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "German")), "Sehr geehrter Herr " &LastName& " " , IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , "Ms."), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "German")), "Sehr geehrte Frau " &LastName& " " , IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , ""), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "German")), "Guten Tag " &FirstName&" "&LastName& " " , IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , "Mr."), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "English")), "Dear Mr. " &LastName&" " , IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , "Ms."), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "English")), "Dear Ms. " &LastName&" ", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , ""), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "English")), "Hello " &FirstName&" "&LastName&" ", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , "Mr."), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "French")), "Monsieur, " &LastName&" " , IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , "Ms."), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "French")), "Madame, " &LastName&" ", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , ""), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "French")), "Bonjour " &FirstName&" "&LastName&" ", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , "Mr."), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "Italian")), "Egregio Signor " &LastName&" " , IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , "Ms."), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "Italian")), "Gentile Signora " &LastName&" ", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , ""), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "Italian")), "Buongiorno " &FirstName&" "&LastName&" ", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , "Mr."), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "Spanish")), "Estimado Sr. " &LastName&" " , IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , "Ms."), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "Spanish")), "Estimada Sra. " &LastName&" ", IF( AND( ISPICKVAL( Salutation , ""), ISPICKVAL ( Language__c, "Spanish")), "Buenas dias " &FirstName&" "&LastName&" " , "" )))))))))))))))
CustomField.label: Salutation (Formal)
